blockers: Botox/Botulinum (BOTU100, BT100) hidden — needs legal review (Schedule 1 Select Agent + Rx-only) before activating on storefront
ET50 from Rosyy never arrived — recorded in PO-2026-0003 (status='partial'). Decide: refund/credit/reorder
Pending Eve PO-2026-0001 still open ($1,350, 13 lines including the $135 CND10 substitution) — awaiting shipment
Welcome 2/3 emails are manual-trigger only (no auto-cron); ok at low volume
Email templates (PO, ambassador welcome, order confirmation) still use dark navy palette — should migrate to cream brand palette eventually
Pre-PO-system inventory has no actual-paid cost record; current Inventory Wholesale falls back to cheapest-vendor for those items. Acceptable but worth noting when reading the dashboard.
current.next_action: Recruit ambassadors via WhatsApp (use docs/ambassadors/recruitment-script.md). Content calendar publishes Mon Apr 27. When ready, schedule a brainstorming session for the OOS-discount-funds-PO idea (see memory/idea_pre_sell_oos_to_fund_pos.md).
current.last_session: 2026-04-18 (second session) — Admin/inventory UX overhaul + dashboard rebuild. Removed 1200px main width cap, collapsible Low Stock banner, table density compressed (action icons, padding 6/8, SKU stacked under product name, min-width 980 with horizontal scroll fallback). Vendor column became a <select> defaulting to cheapest, with 'LOF: <vendor>' subtitle. Split cost into Kit$ + Vial$ columns. Wrote 2026-04-18_reconcile_products_cost.sql to align products.cost+vendor with cheapest vendor_price (one-shot fix; receive flow keeps it accurate going forward). Discovered original seed used cost=retail/2 (50% margin) — old Wholesale was inflated. Rebuilt dashboard with 5 KPI cards: Spent/Committed, Inventory Wholesale (paid-cost basis), Inventory Retail (now + committed POs), Catalog Wholesale, Catalog Retail. Fixed missing unit_cost/received_at in PO items fetch. Captured big idea: heavily discount OOS items, customer payments crowdfund the 10-vial PO (idea_pre_sell_oos_to_fund_pos.md).
completed_today_session2: Admin layout: removed maxWidth:1200 cap; padding 32 → 24px 28px
Inventory: collapsible Low Stock banner, persisted in localStorage
Inventory: table density pass — SKU into Product cell, padding 6/8, action icons, minWidth 980 + horizontal scroll fallback
Inventory: Product column capped at 80px; Vendor bumped to 110 for dropdown
Inventory: action buttons → icon-only with tooltips, Delete (🗑) at end to disambiguate from Cancel ✕
Inventory: replaced JSX-text \uXXXX escapes with literal characters (Refresh, Low Stock, ↓ CHEAPEST, loading)
Inventory: Vendor cell → <select> of all vendors with vendor_prices, sorted cheapest-first; on change persists vendor + cost via /api/product-write
Inventory: 'LOF: <vendor>' subtitle from most-recent submitted PO per product
Inventory: new Kit $ column (per kit, editable in edit mode) + new Vial $ column (per vial, derived/read-only)
Inventory dashboard: 5 KPI cards — Spent/Committed (single card), Inventory Wholesale (paid cost basis), Inventory Retail (with committed PO retail rolled in), Catalog Wholesale, Catalog Retail
Inventory dashboard: cost basis logic — most-recent received unit_cost per product, fallback to products.cost
Inventory dashboard: Committed PO kits roll into Inventory Retail projection (subtitle shows committed slice)
Wrote 2026-04-18_reconcile_products_cost.sql — sets products.cost + vendor = cheapest vendor_price; user ran it
Fixed Spent/Committed showing $0 — added unit_cost + received_at to purchase_order_items SELECT

Pricing audit query (Weak vs Eve/Rosyy): Weak strictly cheapest on 18 SKUs (CagriSema -$35, Dermorphin -$19, Kisspeptin-10 10mg -$14 lead the list), tied on 4, more expensive on 52, sole vendor on 4 (Adipotide, AICAR, Melatonin 10mg, Oxytocin Acetate)
Captured strategic idea: pre-sell OOS items at heavy discount to crowdfund the 10-vial PO (memory/idea_pre_sell_oos_to_fund_pos.md)

roadmap_ideas.title: Discount OOS items to crowdfund 10-vial POs
roadmap_ideas.summary: OOS items show heavy discount price + 'extended wait time' framing; orders queue until enough cash to fund a 10-vial PO; customers ship when kit arrives. Reduces capital tied up; turns dormant OOS state into funding mechanism. Open questions: discount depth, framing honesty, fulfillment risk, eligible products.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Brainstorming session — start by deciding which open question matters most (discount depth vs framing vs fulfillment risk).

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide whether dashboard surfaces both 'actual paid' and 'replacement cost' wholesale
roadmap_ideas.summary: Current Inventory Wholesale uses paid cost basis (PO unit_cost) where known, falls back to products.cost (cheapest vendor). Could add a separate 'Replacement Wholesale' card to make the gap explicit.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Wait until cost basis vs replacement gap actually causes confusion in practice; revisit if Jorrel asks again.

roadmap_ideas.title: Cron the welcome 2/3 emails (currently manual)
roadmap_ideas.summary: subscribe-welcome-2 and subscribe-welcome-3 are manual triggers. At low subscriber volume this is fine; at scale needs Vercel cron + Supabase 'last_sent' tracking on subscribers table.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Defer until subscriber volume justifies the cron+state work.

roadmap_ideas.title: Migrate transactional emails to cream brand palette
roadmap_ideas.summary: PO confirmation, order confirmation, ambassador welcome still use dark navy (legacy from Elysian branding). Should match advnce labs cream + cyan + amber identity.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Batch all three transactional templates in one pass when ready for visual polish.

roadmap_ideas.title: Botox/Botulinum legal review before activation
roadmap_ideas.summary: BOTU100 and BT100 hidden on storefront. Schedule 1 Select Agent + Rx-only. Need attorney review before exposing.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Engage legal counsel; estimate ~$500-1500 for opinion letter.

roadmap_ideas.title: Subscription model: customers commit to monthly volume for discount
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Smooth out PO cadence by giving subscribers a discount in exchange for committing to monthly volume. Adjacent to the OOS pre-sell idea — both convert future demand into present cash flow.

roadmap_ideas.title: Wholesale ambassador kits — front cash for inventory at wholesale, sell at retail
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Ambassadors front cash for a starter kit at wholesale prices, then sell at retail and keep the margin. Bigger lever than commission program but riskier (compliance, customer support burden, reputation if mishandled).

setup.next_setup_action: Optional: Create ROADMAP.md if a formal roadmap doc is desired. roadmap_ideas[] in this file is the working list.
